reviews.title: Good sound and battery life, touch activated button bad
reviews.text: Overall, this is a good earbud. However, if you hold it in your hand you run the risk of your skin/touch activating the voice commands, it hears a random snippet of what you’re saying and it calls someone from your address book that kinda sorta sounds like what you had said and you have to quickly try to hang up as your phone dials someone you haven’t talked to in 5 years, you whispering “oh f*** nononono” over and over until it hangs up and you pray it didn’t actually connect on their side but it does every damn time and then you’re forced into a conversation of pleasantries. So like...yeah it works well, good range but the touch activated button was a big no from me.

title: Skullcandy Jib True Wireless Earbud with Microphone / 22 Hour Battery Life / Use with iPhone and Android / Best for Gym, and Gaming / Bluetooth Earbud Headphones - Black/Orange
description: Experience total freedom on a budget with Jib True. The newest true wireless earbud from Skullcandy is easy to connect and easy to enjoy. Call, track change, and volume controls are all within close reach through one main button. 22 hours of audio on a single charge means you spend less time recharging and more time enjoying your music. Jib True earbuds are adventure-ready, too. An IPX4 rating means Jib True is sweat- and dust-resistant. You don’t need to worry about damage if a little rain kicks up during your urban or outdoor adventure. Dual microphones make your calls more clear and if you feel like keeping one ear open, you can use either bud ‘solo’ without missing a beat.
features: Supreme Sound - Powered by 6mm drivers the Jib features dynamic audio with gnarly bass and a wide sound range. The earbuds also feature bluetooth 5.0 for a strong signal making sure you can listen to your music or take phone calls interruption free.

22 Hours of Play - With a 55mAh battery in the earbud and 500 mAh in the charging case you'll get a whopping 22 hours of charge total, 6 in the earbuds and 16 in the case. Use the included charging case for on the go charging as well as safe storage for your earbuds.

Dual Microphones - keeping you sounding extra clear while on calls or talking to your best friend Siri. Dual mics also means you can have 1 ear open and 1 earbud in while on calls to keep aware of your surroundings.

Small, Medium, Large Ears - Included in the Jib is 3 different eargel tips to make sure you have comfy noise isolating fit. The earbuds are super lightweight and water/dust resistant perfect for the active person!
Buy With Confidence - 1 year manufacturer's warranty included with the Jib, be sure to wear your earbuds with full confidence.

reviews.title: Unusably uncomfortable
reviews.text:
Feels premium in the hand.
Sound amazing for in-ear headphones at this price point.
Gets unbearably uncomfortable after 10 minutes in my ears. I have normal sized ears, but the shoulder of even the smallest the ear hooks dig in and hurt terribly really quickly. Super disappointing, as the sound quality is really good for the price. Returning and continuing to use my $17 Anker buds that are as comfortable as can be (though, admittedly they have anemic bass)

reviews.title: High quality ear buds
reviews.text:
These work great on my iPhone but do not connect to my laptop. I tried everything and they won’t work on my laptop at all. They connected in seconds to my iPhone though.

The sound quality is crisp and clear. The battery life has been great and I’m overall happy with my purchase.

reviews.title: Great value for the money
reviews.text: Are use this for the gym they’re pretty comfortable and they kind of stay in my ears were none of the others do. I must have small inner ears ,but the sound is fine I haven’t spoken to anybody on the phone yet to hear if I sound clear, but as far as the music goes it does the job!

reviews.title: Fantastic headphones
reviews.text: I’m just now ordering my second pair. Original pair still work, but the cord is finally stiff and cracking after thousands of miles cycling, hiking, and hundreds of hours in the gym. I see a lot of people complaining about the mic, I don’t think I’ve ever used that function so I can’t speak to that.  However, the sound quality is better than my iPod Pros, and they still sound great at 25mph on the bike, I’ve never once had an issue with wind noise or of them falling out.  Great value for the money.

reviews.title: Cheap Buys Cheap
reviews.text: Not sure what I expected for so little, so shame on me. I'll tell you these made my 9-year-old's ears hurt. I'm not sure how they could cancel any noise, as there is no buffer. I tried the ones she put on and they are very uncomfortable. Returning.

reviews.title: Great product and great price.
reviews.text: We bought a pack of these for my son because he goes through headphones crazy fast; since we bought these, he's still on the first pair. We will be buying more in the future if we have to.

reviews.title: They are priced low enough that a defective or marginal one doesn't sour the price.
reviews.text: Quality control could be a little better, but the price for the multipack is tough to beat.

reviews.title: For the cost… I am super happy with them.
reviews.text: I’m giving these earbuds five stars because they exceed my expectations when they only cost seventy cents each. I find it hard to complain about these, especially considering the cost. The sound is quite adequate for such earbuds. I use these in a classroom setting for kids who either cannot afford earbuds or forget there is at home. They are individually packaged. Nice assortment of colors. Though they are being sold by a US company, I do not show where they are made. I can only assume they are made in China.

reviews.title: Great Sound Just Wish they had a Microphone
reviews.text: Fun colors and love this type of ear plug over the cone shaped style. Listening to music on my phone sounds great  but I wish they had a microphone so I could easily answer calls. Now I have to unplug the earphones when the phone starts to ring and then re-plug after I'm done on the call. I guess they are really designed for use on exclusive music players. The listing is confusing because it says "Bluetooth" which they don't have, but the wire is about 4ft. long so your music unit can easily be kept anywhere convenient. No volume control either so that has to be handled on your phone/music player.

title: SIMOLIO Wireless Headphones for TV Watching with Transmitter/Charging Dock 2 in 1, 2.4G Wireless Earbuds for TV Listening, Dialog Mode & Boosted Vol & Spare Battery for Seniors, by-Pass, 100ft Range
features: WIRELESS EARPHONES FOR TV FOR HARD OF HEARING W/ TV AUDIO LISTENING ASSISTANCE - Voice clarity and noise reduction tech reduces distracting background noises and makes you hear each word spoken on your favorite show with full intelligibility. Automatic signal control tech stabilizes sudden increases in TV volume to prevent damage to your hearing. Supports optical, RCA and 3.5 mm audio outputs on most TVs. Not recommended for pacemaker carriers.

ADVANCED 2.4GHZ AUTO FHSS TECH, NO PAIRING OR DELAY, 100FT LONG TRANSMISSION - Operating on the 2.4GHz radio frequency, this tv wireless earphone has superior sound reproduction and a powerful signal that can pass through ceilings or walls. No pairing required, no lip-sync delay, no need to be facing a certain angle or position, and no interference when someone passes by.

PROFESSIONAL WIRELESS TV HEADPHONE, CUSTOMIZE THE TV SOUND TO BEST FIT YOU - people with different sound frequency sensitivities can select TONE (treble/normal/bass) to find the best parameters and hear the target source clearly. The BALANCE control is specifically designed for people with different hearing levels in the left and right ears. You can select STEREO on the transmitter to enjoy Hi-fi music or MONO to enjoy clearer TV conversations.

UNIQUE 3 IN 1 DESIGN TV HEADPHONES FOR FULL CONVENIENCE, ERGONOMIC NECKBAND & SOFT EARBUDS & SPARE BATTERY FOR LASTING TV ENJOYMENT - Transmitter, charging base and headset stand 3-in-1 design for your full convenience. The built-in rechargeable and replaceable Li-battery supports 7 hours playtime. A spare battery is always in the base charged & ready for lasting TV enjoyment. The ergonomic neckband design and ultra-soft ear tips bring you an easy and comfortable TV viewing experience.

WIRELESS EARBUDS FOR TV WITH INNOVATIVE “BY-PASS” FEATURE SUPPORTS SIMULTANEOUS AUDIO TRANSMISSION TO WIRELESS HEADPHONE AND WIRED TV SOUBNDBAR - If you only have one TV audio output and it is currently occupied by your soundbar or AV receiver, the by-pass feature can help you, and it’s the best solution for families watching TV together.

reviews.title: I'm not keen on the cover material
reviews.text:
While the Arae Electronic Organizer does what it says, its implementation isn't great.

The double layers of this product has one and a half flap of elastic bands to hold bundled up wires, that's 18 spots total. The rest are two large pockets and a small pocket. That's plenty of room to carry most charging accessories that you'd have with you if you were equipped with tablets and phones. For laptops and cameras, you'll need other solutions. Even action camera chargers may have a hard time fitting in this slim product.

It's not a problem that this thing is pretty much made out of nylon from the outside in but the material that makes up the exterior of this product makes it look cheap. It's a rough, synthetic material that just makes it a bit cheap looking. I think cloth or leather would have been a better choice.

In addition, the zipper sticks, making it hard to quickly open this up to retrieve your wires for charging.

reviews.title: Case closed
reviews.text:
It's pretty amazing how much this will hold and still close up properly. I am using it for many cables and some adapters, and I am also keeping those little instruction manuals that come with everything in one of the zipper pouches. You can keep a lot of cables and adapters in this, and it will still zip up and be small enough for travel.
I like this case a lot.

reviews.title: Smaller than expected
reviews.text: Water proof? Not going to try that. This is super slim so you can't really fit a whole lot in. Wires, maybe... but devices, like portable routers, not exactly. Slim portable chargers, sure. Higher capacity batteries, nope. Won't fit anything more than two iPhones thick.

reviews.title: No More Ziplock Bags
reviews.text: This is such a better alternative to tossing cables into a ziplock bag.  The nice bag with zipper allows me to keep everything in one place.  I wished the compartments were a little wider, but it's easy to just use two compartments. Nice quality bag, once I get spares I would just pack these with a spare ready and be ready to go anytime.  Nice organization addition to my travel gear.

reviews.title: Handy little case
reviews.text: Does a good job at cutting down on cable clutter. I took a black Sharpie and identified the various cords by writing abbreviations on the cloth stretch band that secures the cords. It also helps organize miscellaneous adapters and charging units. Not sure how long it will last but for organizing cords and small electronic items it’s a good buy.

title: Bose SIE2i Sport Headphones - Purple
description:
Product Description
Push your workout to the limit with headphones that are up to the task. Bose SIE2i sport headphones, customized for select Apple devices, are specifically engineered for exercise. They're sweat- and weather-resistant, stay comfortably yet securely in place and deliver robust Bose sound to keep you energized - a combination of benefits conventional sport ear buds can't match. Plus, the inline remote and microphone let you control music on your iPhone or iPod and take calls with one-touch ease.
From the Manufacturer
Bose® SIE2i sport headphones
Tonally balanced audio with crisp highs and deep lows
Tonally balanced audio with crisp highs and deep lows
StayHear ear tips remain in place even during strenuous workouts

Engineered for exercise™
Push your workout to the limit with headphones that are up to the task. Bose SIE2i sport headphones, customized for select Apple devices, are specifically engineered for exercise. They're sweat- and weather-resistant, stay comfortably yet securely in place and deliver robust Bose sound to keep you energized—a combination of benefits conventional sport earbuds can't match. Plus, the inline remote and microphone let you control music on your iPhone or iPod and take calls with one-touch ease.
Water-resistant cloth keeps rain and sweat away from the headphones' speakers
Energizing sound. Bold style.
Exclusive TriPort headphone technology delivers wide-range sound, including the deep, convincing lows that give your music—and your workout—its pulse. And because it comes from an in-ear headphone, you'll feel driven without feeling closed off from your environment—a must when you're running outdoors. These headphones can add extra punch to your exercise routine.
Stability and durability
Our StayHear tips conform securely and comfortably to your ears' shape, even during vigorous workouts. The speaker elements are covered with hydrophobic cloth that keeps moisture out but lets sound pass through. Cables and connections are made extra sturdy. SIE2i sport headphones are made for motion. Even their bold colors (Green, Orange, Blue, Purple) have an energy all their own.
One-touch ease for music and calls
SIE2i sport headphones have an inline remote that offers convenient control over the music on your iPod or iPhone. Skip a tune with the press of a button. No need to touch your device—a great feature for running. There's also an inline microphone for taking calls and switching seamlessly between calls and music.
StayHear tips come in 3 sizes (S, M, L)
Reebok fitness armband
There's another great workout feature—the exclusive Reebok armband. It holds your music device in place when you're exercising, and stores the headphones when you're not. It even has a separate pocket for your keys. It's made of stretchy, breathable fabric that adjusts to fit most smartphones and MP3 players, and has a touch-sensitive window for easy usability. Available in colors to match your SIE2i sport headphones.

reviews.title: Best headphones I have ever had
reviews.text: With Bose, you never have to worry about the sound quality.  It is excellent as usual.  The 3 different sized of ear pieces provided allow for a personalized fit.  They stay in place during all sorts of activities (running, yard work, etc..) and the soft earpieces are very comfortable.  The cord is split into 2 pieces which can be very convenient at times.  Without the extension, it works perfectly for an arm/exercise band.  With the extension, you can stick the phone in your pocket, backpack, etc..  and have some cord to spare.  The connection between the extension and the main cord is large and will make the cord feel heavy at times.  My ONLY complaint is that the cord is made of a very "rubbery" material and it tends to catch on itself (if you wind it up when not in use, it is a little tough to untangle it).  Other than that, I love these headphones.  I liked mine so much, I bought a second pair for my wife, who uses them regularly as well.  HIGHLY recommended.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Very comfortably for running in.  Can hardly feel them.  I like how you can still hear things around you.

reviews.title: Bose sport headphones
reviews.text:
Fantastic Bose sound.
The assortment of earpieces fit with no problem and the additional stabilizers don't allow the earbuds to fall out! even when on the elliptical trainer.
A great deal. Highly recommended.

reviews.title: Favorite running headphone, worth the splurge.
reviews.text: I've had these headphones for over 2 years with no complaints. I used to go through headphones on a monthly basis, but Bose provided me with the quality and durability I was looking for with sport headphones. I one time accidentally put these headphones in the washer and dryer, because they were left in my pocket, and they still work with no defects. (Sweat-proof and maybe even waterproof) They are great for staying safe while running or biking outdoors, while still providing excellent Bose sound quality. I like the interchangeable earpieces for the perfect fit and comfort while running. There is no need to readjust or worry about the earpieces falling out or getting yanked out. The versatile cord length was a bonus for less cord hassle, but if this product were to be upgraded I might suggest a flat cord for less tangle during storage.

reviews.title: Great in ear head phones.
reviews.text: Use almost daily with iPhone. Good sound, good quality very water resistant. The extension cable is a nice touch. You won't be disappointed. NO heavy Bass, just crystal clear music.

reviews.title: Pros and Cons
reviews.text: Pros:  I really like these holders.  I would give it a 5 star if they were all alike.  two are as demoed in the video and two are totally different.  Cons:  The two white/clear holders are totally different from the blamk and pink.  The clear back just snaps on, and does not completely close and lock with the circle ring.  If it snaps apart, you could loose the airtag!!!  I decided to keep them because I do like the pink and black.  I put the other two in my car in case it was stolen.  The other two I can put on my key ring.  Very nice holder, just wish all four were like the pink and black.  It does NOT show this in the demo video.

reviews.title: These are crap ear buds don't get them.
reviews.text: These are not loud at all. I can barely hear what I'm playing through them in bed, at the gym it's impossible to make anything out. You'd figure that spending this much on ear buds would mean they'd be good, high quality ear buds, but that simply is not the case.

reviews.title: but the reality is that I love this brand with speakers
reviews.text:
Time has passed since I returned them, so I don't remember exactly all the details, but the reality is that I love this brand with speakers, my main left and right speakers in my home theater are Klipsch. Excellent. But these in-ear headphones sounded bad. No low end, mid-rangy. Only manually pushing them I could get a better sound, but always too much towards the mids and mid-high frequencies.
I had higher expectations with them, knowing the brand. I thought they could be headphones I would like and trust to listen to music, and also being able to do exercises. I'm not 100% sure now, but I think I remember I couldn't keep them on while running and sweating.

reviews.title: Great Sound With Comfort And Stability
reviews.text:
This is an excellent set of Sports headphones that sounds great and stays put when you're getting your workout in. The headphones use a dual magnet, dynamic moving coil micro speaker to deliver a frequency response of 10HZ to 19kHz making them more than adequate for listening outside of the gym as well. While these headphones work with any device they are truly made for the Apple line of products (iPhone, iPad, iPod) as the control box gives you control over the volume, skip tracks and even take calls.

►► SOUND QUALITY ◄◄

The sound across the board is excellent from the low-end through the mid-range and high-end. They are not as open and airy as my Ultimate Ears TripleFi 10's, a set that listed for $399 retail, but they don't feel muted at all when listening to them.

Testing through a variety of music genres it would seem that these are tuned for the louder, upbeat music that you'd listen to while working out which makes sense since these are Sports headphones. With that said if I would have no problem listening to acoustic music through these as they product a nicely balanced, clean sound that is better than a lot of wired headsets I've tried. They are way better than the headphones included with my iPhone.

►► COMFORT ◄◄

For me comfort is just as important as sound quality because if your in-ear monitors aren't comfortable you won't want to wear them for extended periods of time. This set does a couple things right in the comfort arena with the design of the oval earbuds and the over the ear wire design that keeps the headphones in place and makes them feel as close to weightless as you can get.

I was a bit skeptical of the oval design of the earbuds as I am very used to the circular design and have been very happy with the Comply tips that I normally use. With that said the oval design here truly does seem to make a difference in the comfort of these tips as the included tips are more comfortable than most, if not all, of the standard tips I've had included in a set of headphones.

►► CONTROLS ◄◄

There is a small control box attached to the clip that you can use to keep the cord in place. The control box is very similar to those on other sets of headphones I have tested and it worked pretty much as expected except for the way you move up and down in the track list.

The top button on the control box is used to raise the volume on your device.

The bottom button on the control box is used to lower the volume on your device.

The center button is the most versatile as a quick click will play or pause your music or answer a call if the phone is ringing. A double tap of the center button will move to the next track in your track listing and a triple tap of the center button will move to the previous track. Pressing and holding the center button for a second will initiate Siri. While I am used to the volume buttons normally doubling up as the previous / next track control once I was used to this system it was a breeze to use.

►► PHONE CALLS ◄◄

The headset does a nice job with calls due to the fact that the microphone is nice and clear so there is no worries about taking a call while wearing these headphones.

►► CONCLUSION ◄◄

Overall this is an excellent set of Sports headphones that are both comfortable and sound great. They stay firmly in place and seem to be built to handle whatever wear and tear you will throw at them while working out. I love having full control over my iPhone with the included control. For me this is about as close to perfect as you can come with a Sports set of headphones. Highly recommended.

Sample provided for review.

reviews.title: Just right for me.
reviews.text: Diggin' these just fine. I can see how maybe people with tiny ears, or oddly shaped ears, might not have the right fit. Also, the portion in-ear is quite tiny, so there's not a huge amount of bass, but I still like the clarity, and there's enough adjustability to tailor the sound, even on my tiny Sandisc Mp3 player. What I like the most though, is the over the ear design, and I can have the wires feed out back out of my way. The portion in-ear, with the smallish oval tips, also makes me quite happy. So small, and un-noticeable, and comfortable, and they stay put till the end of my hike, or run, or skate, or whatever. The ones that came with the player sounded good too, but really annoying and would fall out when you get sweaty or turn your head. And I just didn't have a bunch of the new-style design to try out, with the horn on them that you rotate and lock into the ear. I read that those kind still fall out when sweaty and slippery anyway. (or you don't get the right fit). All problems solved with these sporty little guys. And Klipsch speakers and equipment have always impressed, so I'm glad I trusted my instincts...

title: Apple Headphones Wired iPhone Earbuds with Lightning Connector [Apple MFi Certified] Earphones with Built-in Microphone & Volume Control Compatible with iPhone 14/13/12/11/XR/XS/X/7/8/8Plus/SE
description: Apple Headphones Wired iPhone Earbuds with Lightning Connector [Apple MFi Certified] Earphones with Built-in Microphone & Volume Control Compatible with iPhone 14/13/12/11/XR/XS/X/7/8/8Plus/SE
features: 🎵【Advanced Noise Reduction Technology】This Lightning interface earbud has a built-in omnidirectional noise reduction microphone, which can effectively avoid noise during a call and ensure the quality of the call. The professional audio system reduces the loss of signal output and restores the real sound quality effect, allowing you to be on the scene.

🎵【Wide Compatibility】The Apple earbud works with all devices that have light-ning connector and support iOS 10 or later, including compatible with iPhone 14/14 Pro/13/13 Pro Max/12/12 Pro/11/11 Pro/X/XS/XS Max/XR, iPhone 8 & 8 Plus/7 & 7 Plus, iPad Pro/Mini 4/Air 2.

🎵【Microphone & Volume Control】The Apple headphone cable comes with a built-in microphone and controller. The remote lets you adjust the volume, control the playback, and answer or end calls with a pinch of the cord. The speakers inside maximize sound output and minimize sound loss, provide you high-quality audio.

🎵【Comfortable Wearing Experience】The earphone with ergonomic angular design and ultra-lightweight in-ear designed, allow you to listen to the music for a long time without pain perception and keep a long sense of comfort during the wear.Perfect for Gaming and Daily Uses (Walking, Office, Sleeping etc.)

🎵【Wired Bluet00th Headset】As this earphone is a Bluet00th connectivity version. You need to turn on the Bluet00th in your Phone or Pad, then plug the earphone in to connect them. When next time you use the earphone again, it will automatically connect to your device in 2-8 seconds. ATTENTION: This is very important, it is the first step that must done.

reviews.title: Best for DVDs and Inserts - HIGHLY RECOMMENDED
reviews.text: I've tried a few of these DVD albums, and this is best of the rest. The insert section is roomy enough so you only have to fold along one line and it will slide in comfortably  thus you can see the front and title edge. With Bellagio, you have to double fold, and it creases your insert more than you might want, especially if you think someday you might resell them -- messes with the aesthetics. As far as room, I can slip in 2 inserts, moving one up and under the blank space above and keeping the other low, so able to utilize every slot without feeling like I'm cheating myself by not having both inserts. In addition, for those annoying 3 disc DVDs/BluRay sets, you can slide one of the discs in with the insert, and it will be safe there. It's a sturdy product. I've been using my 240 count for 3 years now, and just bought a 120 in June. The 240 has held up very nicely, and I expect the same of the 120. If you have a large collection you want to transfer, you might want to do some planning ahead of time on how you want group your DVDs, because once you have packed your album, it is difficult to move pages around to reorganize. I had to remove my DVD and inserts. As long as it's not packed, you can manage. The metal clip is very strong and it's a firm hold, but when the slots are full, the bulk of it slides all the pages out because the pages are slick. I didn't have help to hold them in place, and you're going to need it. Leave a few empty in your groupings for new DVDs. The pages themselves are a good quality plastic and soft backing to avoid scratching. It's nicely balanced. I would recommend the 120 more than the 240 because it's easier to carry and store when full but as I said, my 240 has held up very nicely in 3 years. It is currently about 16# full. I don't carry the 240 by the handle. Don't want to push my luck. I can find no damage or weakening in it and every single original page is double packed with CDs  & Inserts, plus, I swiped a few pages from the 120 to put into the 240.  The downside is, if the pages ever do start to rip or tear, you can't find refills -- I've looked.  I have no hesitation in recommending this to anyone wanting to get away from cases and consolidate your DVD collection.  I just haven't found anything else I'm happy with.

reviews.title: Extended, USB ports, Easy use
reviews.text: The power protector is helpful with 4 outlets and 4 USB ports because two outlets on wall are not enough for me. Each outlet has wide space between each other and my chargers can plug in tightly and stable. There is also a flash LED light at the bottom which helps me to find it easily in the darkness. The USB port can easily charge power for electronic device and cell phone without a iPhone charger.

reviews.title: Excellent value
reviews.text: The right tool for the job.  I need clear power to my VOIP home phone w/Magic Jack.  This small unit fits into the environment and provides necessary power in standard plug in and USB configurations.  I like its compact size and would use it again.

reviews.title: Looks good quality
reviews.text: These are amazing. Ordered 2 to start and expecting 3 more to deliver today. Definitely wish I could order more filler papers.

reviews.title: Works Great !!!
reviews.text: So far this works great, and usb charges pretty quick, pretty convenient, and sturdy.
